steps.action: Open homepage and inspect swap amount input fields
steps.expected: Swap amount inputs use proportional sans font (not monospace)
steps.observed: Both swap inputs use class `font-sans` with computed `font-family: GeistSans, "GeistSans Fallback"`

steps.action: Inspect key price/value texts (price overlay + stats value)
steps.expected: Price/stat values use proportional sans font
steps.observed: Price overlay (`$0.000000`) and sampled stat/value texts use `font-sans` and computed GeistSans

evidence.network: No additional API polling performed during rerun

steps.action: Inspect chart section wrapper/container computed styles
steps.expected: Chart wrapper has no card border/background padding wrapper
steps.observed: Chart container chain shows borderless wrapper (`relative h-[356px] w-full overflow-hidden rounded-lg`) with computed border `0px`, background `transparent`, padding `0px`; parent wrappers are also borderless

steps.action: Capture visual evidence of chart area
steps.expected: No outer card border around chart section
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms chart flows directly in page layout without an outer bordered card wrapper

evidence.network: No requests captured in agent-browser network log; structural style validated via computed styles

frictions.description: Chart rendered in empty-data fallback state (`No chart data available`), but required borderless-wrapper assertion remained verifiable via computed styles.
frictions.resolution: Validated wrapper/container styles directly (border/background/padding/class chain) instead of relying on live chart data.

summary: Tested 2 rerun assertions; both passed. VAL-TYPE-001 confirmed swap/price/value typography is proportional (GeistSans). VAL-CHART-005 confirmed chart wrapper is borderless via computed style evidence.
